nasb.text: He cuts off his own feet and drinks violence Who sends a message by the hand of a fool.

esv.text: Whoever sends a message by the hand of a fool cuts off his own feet and drinks violence.

cnv.text: 藉愚昧人的手傳遞信息的， 是自斷己足，自尋煩惱。

ccb.text: 靠愚人传信， 如同砍断自己的脚， 自讨苦吃。

csbs.text: 藉着愚昧人的手传送信息的， 就是自砍双脚、自讨苦吃。
